name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 21 Jul 2025
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release contains updates for the eCommerce versions 6.337.0, 6.338.0, and 6.339.0."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancements and Changes"}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"New Services Added for My Post Business"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Neto has updated its My Post Business integration to include their newly introduced lightweight parcels - Extra Small/250g options."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Available for Australia Post packaging and customers' packaging, in both Parcel Post and Express Post services, the new options are:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Parcel Post Flat Rate Satchel 5 kg (Extra small)"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Express Post Flat Rate Satchel 5 kg (Extra small)"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Parcel Post Flat Rate Own Packaging Up to 250 g (Extra small)"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Express Post Flat Rate Own Packaging Up to 250 g (Extra small)"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Updated AfterPay Checkout Message Per Compliance"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"As per Afterpay’s new compliance guidelines, the Afterpay message on the Checkout page has been updated to include the total product price alongside the repayment breakdown."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Fixes"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where Apple/Google Pay Express Checkout was overriding the customer-selected shipping method. This has been fixed, and the shipping method selected for the cart or checkout form is retained."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where some users' exported Stock Evaluation reports displayed an internal server error at the bottom of the report."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the Auspost International Print Labels were missing the itemized weight information."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the guest users are unable to print a receipt from the Order Success page at Checkout."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
